title: Sarina Glass vinegar and oil bottle, 500 ml, pearl plain oil bottle, oil dispenser glass, dishwasher safe
features: These high quality glass bottles are excellent for use with liquid drinks, ingredients, oil, vinegar, and much more

description: Sarina oil and vinegar dispenser is a decorative and very useful kitchen accessory. This allows vinegar and oil to be placed stylishly on the set table and dosed sparingly. The oil bottle is made of glass and a plastic lid. The oil dispenser has a volume of 500 ml.
